description: Reusable image and prompt profile definitions shared across Whisperwood Universe entity schemas.

imageProfile.description: Model-agnostic visual generation settings. Avoid engine-specific parameters.

defaultPrompt.description: Base positive prompt describing the canonical visual appearance.

negativePrompt.description: Base negative prompt excluding undesired visual elements.

artStyle.description: Intended artistic style (e.g. watercolor, flat illustration, soft 3D).

lighting.description: Preferred lighting mood (e.g. soft daylight, golden hour, gentle indoor).

cameraStyle.description: Typical framing or camera treatment (e.g. eye-level, warm portrait, wide establishing).

timeOfDay.description: Default time of day for generated imagery.

notes.description: Additional visual direction for illustrators and image generation systems.

promptTemplate.description: Reusable, model-agnostic prompt template for a specific AI generation purpose.

prompt.description: Primary prompt text. May include placeholders documented in notes.

negativePrompt.description: Optional negative prompt for generation tasks that support it.

mergeStrategy.description: How consumers should combine this template with dedicated profiles.

notes.description: Placeholder definitions, usage context, and merge instructions.

promptProfile.description: Centralized prompt templates for AI systems. Complements dedicated profiles; consumers should merge per mergeStrategy to avoid duplication.

animation.description: Prompt template for animation generation or motion direction.

voice.description: Prompt template for voice synthesis direction.

thumbnail.description: Prompt template optimized for small-format preview images.

story.description: Prompt template for AI story generation.

map.description: Prompt template for map tile or cartographic illustration generation.

ambient.description: Prompt template for ambient audio or soundscape direction.
